sys_script_client.description:
2.7.2 2.7.2 | 2022-01-13 | mmcc | STRY0110656 - UI- Fixed Header and Button Bars on ALL Modals and lists Added footer style display none
2.7 STRY0108170 - DIA- Org Hierarchy– Hierarchy Request Form DFCT0010643 - Remove "Context Menu" from a "New" Organizational Hierarchy " Request Update" on Portal
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Modal Save Changes Message Tasker - Title - Request Hierarchy Update Tasker - There are no available Hierarchy Administrators. Please contact your Application Administrator to add Hierarchy Administrators.
sys_script_client.name: OU Hierarchy-onSubmit Open Request Modal
